hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$file" | grep -q '\.dart$' && command -v flutter > /dev/null 2>&1 && cd apps/mobile && flutter analyze --no-fatal-warnings 2>&1 | tail -10 || true
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$file" | grep -qE 'apps/api/src/.*\.ts$' && cd apps/api && npx eslint --max-warnings=0 "$file" 2>&1 | tail -15 || true
